# Pull Request

## Summary

- What changed:
- Why it changed:

## Scope

- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Schema or contract
- [ ] Skill instructions
- [ ] Demo or knowledge examples
- [ ] Packaging, scripts, or tests

## Safety Checks

- [ ] I used synthetic examples only.
- [ ] I did not add real logos, private decks, customer names, personal data, or local brand kits.
- [ ] I did not edit unrelated files.
- [ ] I updated docs, schema, demo notes, or changelog where needed.
- [ ] I added or updated an ADR if this changes a lasting project decision.

## Validation

Describe what you checked:

- Commands:
- Manual review:
- Known gaps:

## Release Notes

One short sentence for `CHANGELOG.md`, or `None`.
